description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a futuristic, tactical appearance. The individual has a slim build and is dressed in a fitted, segmented outfit featuring padded shoulders, gloves, and boots, with accent details on the upper arm and chest. The figure's hair is long and pulled back, and they wear large, wraparound eyewear that covers much of the upper face. The outfit includes a utility pouch on the right hip and reinforced elements on the forearms and shins, suggesting a functional, urban-ready design. The overall look is sleek and modern, with a focus on mobility and protection. The character's stance is neutral, with arms slightly outstretched and feet shoulder-width apart.
description: A futuristic adult pedestrian in a fitted, tactical outfit with long hair pulled back and large eyewear, standing in a neutral pose. The attire features padded segments, utility details, and a sleek, urban-ready design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face with large eyewear, padded shoulders, and utility pouch on the right hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the length of the hair, and the layered outfit details on the arm and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head with hair pulled back, the fitted back of the outfit, and the utility pouch on the right hip.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the face, the eyewear, and the reinforced segments on the arm and leg.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted tactical suit with padded segments, gloves, and utility pouch
